description: Empty-pipeline validation fixture for frontend-decomposition VAL-DASH-013. This fixture drives the truly-empty-pipeline empty-state guidance test. Sheet ID: create a new empty spreadsheet and use its ID here. The sheet should have only the Pipeline header row (no data rows).

usage.description: When the pipeline has no jobs at all, both the brief and the pipeline area show helpful empty-state guidance or setup/discovery CTAs instead of empty chrome.
usage.testProcedure: 1. Apply this fixture by setting localStorage command_center_config_overrides to point at the empty sheet ID. 2. Reload the dashboard. 3. Verify both the Daily Brief and the pipeline area show empty-state guidance (not blank chrome).
usage.switchingNote: Dashboard can switch between populated and empty fixtures by changing the sheet ID in localStorage command_center_config_overrides. The seed-pipeline-data-populated.json fixture uses sheet ID 1mGJ04E3f2Tp0-7ErNlb8veXjnlKz3x5a6gwyzEFvnKQ.
